# Payme Business SDK for Go

A Go SDK for the Payme Business payment platform. Pure Go standard library, no external dependencies.

## Project structure

- `payme/` - root package: client, cards, receipts, payment helpers, constants, test data
- `payme/merchant/` - Merchant API server-side handler (JSON-RPC 2.0)
- `payme/rpc/` - JSON-RPC 2.0 error types and codes
- `payme/subscribe/` - Subscribe API types (receipts, cards, payers)
- `payme/models/` - shared types (transaction, account, receiver)
- `examples/` - working examples for subscribe client and merchant server

## Key types

- `payme.Client` - Subscribe API HTTP client
- `payme.merchant.Handler` - Merchant API HTTP handler
- `payme.merchant.MerchantHandler` - interface merchants implement
- `payme.rpc.Error` - JSON-RPC 2.0 error with localized messages
- `payme.subscribe.Receipt` - payment receipt
- `payme.subscribe.Card` - card token info
- `payme.models.Transaction` - merchant transaction

## Installation

```
go get github.com/xusk947/payme-sdk-go
```

## Authentication

- Full auth: `merchantID:key` (server-side methods: receipts.*, cards.remove)
- Partial auth: `merchantID` only (client-side methods: cards.create, cards.check, cards.verify, cards.get_verify_code)

## Test data

- Test merchant ID: `5e730e8e0b852a417aa49ceb`
- SMS code for all test cards: `666666`
- Test cards: Uzcard `8600495473316478` (0399), Uzcard `8600069195406311` (0399), Humo `9860010101010101` (0399)
- Sandbox URL: `https://checkout.test.paycom.uz/api`

## Documentation

- Official API docs: https://developer.help.paycom.uz/
- Go reference: https://pkg.go.dev/github.com/xusk947/payme-sdk-go
